textByHash.20f219e2640d159b6bc2c350fa177fe071a65f42: Sorry, but I can't see that happening right now. Maybe once you're more experienced.
textByHash.35c56320ee2d40f65580dff7de952c9ac968226c: I hope so too, but not before I find it first!
textByHash.5da518b91f582fc547143748f72fac9ec7ba1747: To be honest, a new adventure. The angler's have been good to me, but after the chaos with Tempoross, I'd like a fresh start.
textByHash.7b75666d9cf7f6266cca1fa808f9c2b4596f3397: I think I might be! You just let me know once you start recruiting... provided I don't spot you first, of course!
textByHash.b232010f0084368ef1e13e419868b5a6dd6c40e7: Indeed! It's kind of what I do. The name's Virginia. I'm a lookout for the spirit anglers, as well as a six time eye spy world champion.
textByHash.b34b4ad301f88877a608790ab43b175930eafb1b: Pretty well, though I'm still on the lookout for a new adventure.
textByHash.c10c0640d1f30aa57e63194a4cb10373d834fe49: To be honest, a new adventure. The anglers have been good to me, but after the chaos with Tempoross, I'd like a fresh start.
textByHash.db6bf6236339f7e602e2821056e37555042fd6e2: Sure! I can watch your back!
textByHash.e7582f3ce3446b53fc8b9a1326729849b4e4803c: Pretty good. I'm very much enjoying seeing the sights.
